findings.message: 80.0% of retrieval.skip events have prompt_length=0 (4/5). Hook is not receiving user prompts.
Category CONSTRAINT has non-zero scores but never triggers. Threshold may be too high.
Category DECISION has non-zero scores but never triggers. Threshold may be too high.
Category PREFERENCE has non-zero scores but never triggers. Threshold may be too high.

recommendations: Hook is receiving prompt_length=0. This likely indicates the UserPromptSubmit hook input field name has changed or prompt extraction logic has a bug.
Categories CONSTRAINT, DECISION, PREFERENCE score above zero but never exceed their trigger thresholds. Consider lowering thresholds in memory-config.json (triage.thresholds).
